2024-25 Missouri State Bears Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season Next Season

Record: 9-23 (2-18, 12th in MVC MBB)

Coach: Cuonzo Martin

PS/G: 68.0 (318th of 364)

PA/G: 70.9 (145th of 364)

SRS: -3.94 (201st of 364)

SOS: 0.52 (122nd of 364)

ORtg: 102.4 (293rd of 364)

DRtg: 106.8 (240th of 364)
